repos.name: magento2-module-polyshell-protection
repos.description: Comprehensive defense-in-depth Magento 2 module that closes the PolyShell unrestricted file upload vulnerability (APSB25-94) — blocking polyglot webshell uploads across eight interception layers including request path blocking, controller-level upload prevention, polyglot file detection, and framework-level image hardening.
